assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: The response specifically mentions testing on dev/Rapid clusters and includes dev cluster validation in the pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Mentions mandatory resource requests and Autopilot-specific resource calculation methods, though doesn't explicitly state no node management/SSH

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific kubectl command for checking deprecated APIs: 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_requested_deprecated_apis'

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Review resource requests/limits (Autopilot may have updated defaults)' and resource calculation methods

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Does not mention Pod Disruption Budgets, bare pods, or graceful shutdown configurations

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific commands like 'kubectl version --short' and cluster status verification commands

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Comprehensive workload health section with deployment checks, pod status validation, and application functionality testing

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: First item in pre-upgrade checklist explicitly states 'Verify 1.32 is already running successfully on your dev/Rapid clusters'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Does not mention the GKE release schedule or the timing difference between schedule visibility and upgrade notifications
Includes monitoring setup, alerting configuration, and performance monitoring in both pre and post-upgrade sections

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Proactively recommends setting maintenance exclusions with specific gcloud commands without customer requesting node upgrade control
